four young people stand in a room, facing left, the person on the left has short red hair and a backpack, the second person has glasses, the third is Jinx, and the fourth has dark hair, the room is filled with steampunk-style gadgets and tools, sunlight streams in through a large window, creating bright highlights and shadows, the room is cluttered with various objects and machinery, the camera is positioned at a low angle, looking up at the group, creating a sense of scale and importance, the group is still and looking at something out of frame.
